channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: James Van Der Beek's Wife Kimberly Shares Alana Springsteen's 'I Don't Want to Wait' Cover Day After “Dawson's Creek” Star's Death
item.description: Kimberly shared Alana Springsteen's cover of the show's iconic theme song, which the country singer posted in support of the family's GoFundMe

item.title: Taylor Swift Shares Behind-the-Scenes Glimpse of 'Hysterical' ‘Opalite’ Music Video Shoot: 'I Never Want to Forget'
item.description: The pop superstar dropped the 90s-inspired music video for the track on Feb. 7

item.title: “Love Story” Stars Paul Anthony Kelly and Sarah Pidgeon Take New York City, Plus Neil Patrick Harris, Michelle Yeoh and More
item.description: From New York City to Los Angeles, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Paul Anthony Kelly Listened to JFK Jr.’s Narration of President Kennedy's Book Every Day Before Filming “Love Story” (Exclusive)
item.description: "I would listen to that every day before getting to set," Kelly, 37, says of 'Profiles in Courage,' one of many resources he relied on to nail his por...

item.title: Joanna Gaines’ Entire Home Collection Is Up to 64% Off at Wayfair’s Presidents Day Sale — Deals Start at $29
item.description: Save on stain-resistant rugs and plush throw pillows

item.title: Rep. Jake Auchincloss Tells Fellow Members of Congress to 'Touch Grass'
item.description: Representative Jake Auchincloss says politicians need to ditch their phones and get in touch with nature ... telling us most are nice IRL -- but they ...

item.title: Lou Young Urges Men Not to Blow Their Rent on Pricey Valentine's Day Gifts
item.description: Valentine’s Day is creeping up ... and while couples are busy emptying their wallets, Lou Young is waving a financial red flag. We caught up with Lou ...

item.title: Donna Kelce Refuses To Pressure Travis As NFL Future Hangs In Balance
item.description: Travis Kelce’s NFL future is hanging in the balance … and Mama Kelce says the final call belongs to him! Donna Kelce tells TMZ Sports she’s giving her...

item.title: PINK VS. RED: Ladies in Lacy-Hot Lingerie Who'd You Rather?!
item.description: Pink or red -- either way, these ladies are turning up the heat and making it extremely hard to choose ... Check out these BAD 'N BOLD bods in eye-cat...

item.title: Spike In 'Notting Hill' 'Memba Him?!
item.description: Welsh actor Rhys Ifans was in his early 30s when he played Spike -- the socially awkward flatmate, championing for his roommate to confess his love to...
